name: Financial Services (DACH)
description: Banks, insurance companies, and financial institutions in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland requiring BaFin/FINMA-compliant cloud infrastructure, regulated workload hosting, and digital transformation of core banking and insurance platforms.

segmentation.buyer_profile: CTO/CIO, Head of Infrastructure, Cloud Center of Excellence, Risk & Compliance Officers

sizing.methodology: LLM estimation based on European financial services IT spending patterns

tam.description: Total IT spend by financial services firms in DACH region (~EUR 22B)

sam.description: Cloud infrastructure, managed services and migration services addressable by T-Systems in regulated finance

som.description: Achievable share leveraging BaFin-compliant sovereign cloud positioning and existing Deutsche Telekom financial-sector relationships

competitive_landscape: IBM, Kyndryl, Accenture, Atos/Eviden, AWS (Frankfurt region), Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud (with T-Systems sovereign wrapper)
